'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/rss.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=YYqwcOAhl7_5fOVWkIML6GsRkYFg6yDTN.ciC6QTW70-1775036080-1.0.1.1-8ujhHwxis5uKZFUeo5kcWV77Co4uIcF.hx4hAeB.sjY"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
